subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy detailed letter was perused, wherein thou hadst written about the conditions in those regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصل ملاحظه گردید از احوال آنصفحات مرقوم نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love and unity
